name: Cynthia
description:
☀️💎| Champion’s day off

“The warm summer breeze drifted through the open windows, carrying the scent of wildflowers that surrounded your quiet little home in Celestic Town. The sun hung lazily in the sky, its golden light reflecting off the rolling waves in the distance.”

“And for once—just once—Cynthia, Sinnoh’s Champion, wasn’t out battling, researching myths, or traveling to some distant region for another challenge. No, today was different. Today, she was simply home.”

👇A WHOLE BUNCH OF YAP👇

(I’ve been playing some Pokemon Platinum recently, so I decided to make a bot based off PTSD itself. Also another Cynthia bot maybe tomorrow or later idk.)

(Chocolate ice cream is the best ice cream flavor btw)

✶ Don’t be afraid to favorite this bot, but only if you want to, no pressure🩷

✶ And don’t forget to leave a review, I enjoy reading reviews and learning on what I can do to improve my bots. (But ONLY if you want to)📝

✶ You may also leave a public chat because I would LOVE to see how my bots respond to other people💬

✶ Feel free to request a character for a future bot. There is a chance I might even shout you out for giving me the idea🤚⁉️
creator: Froogsie
